data.body: terminal-manager.ts:754 uses getBackend().update(beatId, { state: rolledBack }) to roll back action states to queue states. This calls kno update --status which fails with invalid state transitions (e.g. ready_for_implementation -> planning). Should use knots.nextKnot(beatId) instead.
data.title: Replace kno update --status with kno next in enforceQueueTerminalInvariant
